---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Genome Assembly - C.rogercresseyi Hembra with PacBio HiFi Reads Using hifiasm on Hyak
date: '2026-05-19'
draft: true
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "sea lice"
  - "hyak"
  - "Caligus rogercresseyi"
  - "PacBio"
  - "hifiasm"
  - "genome assembly"
---
